developer_profile.name: HD Media
developer_profile.title: Software and Context Engineer
developer_profile.tagline: Turning ideas into immersive digital experiences 🚀

features.theme_toggle: Smooth switching between light/dark mode themes with persistent custom styling properties.
features.animations: GSAP timeline handling for scroll interactions micro-animations, Framer motion wrapper for entering/exiting elements and page transitions.

timeline_journey.context: Initiated foundational coding path, focusing on core web fundamentals, markup styling, and semantic layouts to build initial static interfaces.

timeline_journey.achievement: Built Full Stack Projects using MERN
timeline_journey.context: Advanced into comprehensive software engineering. Constructed database-driven web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js.

timeline_journey.achievement: Contributed to Open Source & YouTube Channel
timeline_journey.context: Expanded tech community footprint by contributing production-ready code to open repos and creating technical video documentation detailing complex architectural workflows.

Transitioned to high-end creative coding. Focused entirely on performance-driven React frameworks, Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Web Vitals optimization, and sophisticated, motion-engineered user interfaces.

projects.title: My Portfolio Website
projects.description: A fully responsive personal portfolio website with animations, contact form, dark/light mode toggle, and Firebase integration.

projects.title: Heritage India Website
projects.description: A static website showcasing India's rich heritage, built with Next.js, REST API, and MongoDB. Features smooth scrolling and responsive design.

projects.title: Food Donation Platform
projects.description: An in-progress MERN app connecting food donors with NGOs. Features live map, secure login, and real-time notifications.

image_content.subject: Male developer sitting at a desk
image_content.environment: PC setup with green ambient LED strip lighting

paragraphs.text: A Full Stack Developer driven by passion and curiosity. I design interactive UI/UX, craft scalable web solutions, and love to bring motion and interactivity to life with animation tools like GSAP and Framer Motion.
I'm on a journey of continuous learning, currently exploring the depths of Next.js 14 and AI-integrated web development.

interactive_modules.functionality: A stylized, miniature terminal window that mimics a developer IDE.
visual_elements: Three window control dots (red, yellow, green) in the top-left corner.
A 'Live Status' indicator with a pulsing green neon dot reading: 'STATUS: Open for Freelance & Collaboration'.
interactive_modules.animation: A typewriter or terminal-log execution effect that cycles through core developer tech stacks or lines of structural object configurations (e.g., const developer = { skills: ['Next.js', 'Three.js', 'GSAP'] }).

interactive_modules.module_name: Micro Interactive Audio Visualizer or Metric Callout
interactive_modules.functionality: Bite-sized, clean technical grid stats that display dynamic info.
interactive_modules.interaction: Smooth hover micro-animations (e.g., slight elevation, border color change to the brand's vivid orange).

behavioral_guardrails.do_not_remove: DO NOT remove or hide the far-right vertical outlined text ('CREATE • CODE • REFACTOR'). This widget must coexist alongside it.
behavioral_guardrails.do_not_add: DO NOT introduce profile pictures, stock photographic images, heavy solid blocks, or colorful complex graphics.
behavioral_guardrails.responsiveness: The widget should scale elegantly on smaller viewports, stacking neatly under the main header typography or transitioning out cleanly if screen space is constrained.

end of home page design metadata.title: Creative Developer Portfolio - Hero Bottom Section Polish
end of home page design metadata.section: Hero Left Column - Bottom Footer Layout
end of home page design metadata.design_aesthetic: Brutalist minimalism, rigid alignment, premium layout, completely static

core_directive.constraint: CRITICAL: Absolutely NO animations, tickers, or moving text are allowed in this component. The webpage already has adequate motion. This section must be entirely static and serve as a visual anchor to ground the bottom left of the page.
core_directive.objective: Transform the currently unaligned subheadline ('Turning ideas into Immersive digital experiences') and the loose social media icons into a unified, premium horizontal layout bar.

layout_architecture.grouping: Enclose the subheadline and the social icons inside a single, dedicated horizontal block or bar at the very bottom of the left column.

css_structure.spacing: Utilize precise, deliberate padding and crisp spacing. Use a 'margin-top: auto' layout strategy on the container to firmly weight it to the bottom margin of the page.

visual_styling_details.subheadline_typography: Slightly increase the font size and contrast of the text so it matches the premium weight of the main header titles. Ensure perfect baseline alignment.
visual_styling_details.separator_elements: Introduce thin, sharp vertical divider lines (e.g., '|' or solid 1px low-contrast borders) between the subheadline and the social icons, and between the icons themselves.
visual_styling_details.social_icons_integration: Instead of letting the social icons float raw, convert them into clean, structured text-and-icon pairs (e.g., '[GH] GitHub', '[LN] LinkedIn') or place them inside uniform, ultra-subtle geometric bounding boxes.
visual_styling_details.color_palette: Stick rigidly to the existing theme: high-contrast white text, muted grey for secondary technical labels, and very selective, razor-sharp vivid orange accents on hover states only.

prohibited: DO NOT add marquees, scrolling text loops, or typewriter animations here.
DO NOT alter the main 'CREATIVE DEVELOPER' heading sizes.
DO NOT disrupt the right-side layout configurations built previously.

inspiration_reference.layout_technique: Editorial-style digital design using rigid grid borders, static text blocks, and precise structural lines to organize footer information cleanly without resorting to movement.

project_metadata.title: Creative Developer Portfolio - Hero Section Layout Tuning
project_metadata.objective: Resolve minor layout crowding and optimize macro negative space without altering the HTML structure.

left_column_hero_text.issue: Main title ('CREATIVE DEVELOPER') sits too high and crowds the header navigation.
left_column_hero_text.fix: Increase top padding or apply a slight downward margin shift to lower the vertical center of the left text column, aligning it perfectly with the visual center of the right widgets.

right_column_dashboard_widgets.issue: The terminal window and metrics box are slightly too large, competing with the primary typography for dominance.
right_column_dashboard_widgets.fix: Scale down both widget components uniformly by 10% to 15%. This instantly introduces breathing room between the widgets and the far-right vertical marquee text.

bottom_horizontal_bento_bar.issue: The new footer bar is pinned too closely beneath the main text and widgets, making the layout feel tight vertically.

adjustments.action: Increase the margin-top significantly to push the bento bar firmly toward the bottom viewport boundary, establishing a clear visual separation from the hero core elements.
Slightly increase the contrast/brightness of the dark gray text and icon strings inside the bar to improve legibility against the true black background.

design_guardrails.do_not_change: DO NOT modify the current CSS structural layout (CSS Grid columns or flex grouping). The architectural layout is correct.
design_guardrails.do_not_add_motion: Maintain the strict rule of zero animations or movement in the bottom footer bento bar.
design_guardrails.expected_outcome: The hero section should feel spacious, intentionally balanced, and highly editorial, ensuring the loud typography has room to breathe relative to the technical UI details.

project_metadata.title: Creative Developer Portfolio - About Page Blueprint
project_metadata.design_aesthetic: Dark mode brutalism, tech-dashboard minimalism, rigid structural grids

left_side.content: Ultra-bold, massive editorial typography introducing your identity and engineering core beliefs.
left_side.styling: Matches the heavy font weight of 'CREATIVE DEVELOPER' from the landing page.

right_side.details: A translucent glassmorphic box with a thin, crisp border. It formats your personal details like an open configurations file or system status read-out (e.g., Local Time, Coordinates, Current Availability, Core Environment Configuration).

section_2_workflow_matrix.description: Directly maps back to the homepage vertical marquee concepts. Each column features a static, clean bulleted breakdown of your technical tools, execution workflows, and testing/optimization principles.
section_2_workflow_matrix.styling: Columns are separated by thin, low-contrast 1px vertical borders. Section headers use the brand's vivid orange on highlight.

section_3_journey_timeline.left_side: A vertical stack of bold milestones or years (e.g., 2026, 2024, 2022).
section_3_journey_timeline.right_side: Clean, static description blocks mapping to each milestone containing roles, achievements, and technical contributions.
section_3_journey_timeline.interaction_rule: Utilize purely static visibility or clean CSS transitions. No chaotic tracking animations or scrolling ticker tapes.

prohibited: DO NOT use traditional, generic center-aligned about page columns.
DO NOT insert standard circular avatar image placeholder blocks.
DO NOT introduce fluid, bouncing animations that violate the layout's rigid, premium tech-grid design rules.
DO NOT allow layout elements to collide with global navigation headers.
required: Maintain the same margins, borders, and paddings used in the landing page bento layout.
Keep interactive motion strictly confined to micro-hover states (e.g., borders crisping up or slight orange text shifts on focused items).

llm_instruction_parameters.instruction: Parse this file object-by-object. Every property value contains explicit CSS, HTML, and layout directives that MUST be followed literally. Do not improvise layouts, styles, colors, or structural patterns.

timeline_rows.css_layout: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 80px 40px 1fr; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 24px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #222222;

column_1_year.css: font-family: monospace; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #555555; font-weight: bold;

column_2_icon.svg_graphic_directive: Clean line-art SVG vector star/sparkle icon. No complex gradient layers or fills. Path color: #FF5700 (vivid orange).
column_2_icon.css: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;

strict_prohibitions: DO NOT build massive, card-shaped rounded boxes that look like the previous dashboard mockup templates.
DO NOT wrap items in heavy gradient drop-shadow glows or blue/purple backgrounds.
DO NOT change the global page theme to off-black. It must remain #000000 absolute black.
DO NOT center-align the timeline headers. Alignment must remain left-heavy, matching the editorial design language of the landing page titles.
